---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size70[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size35[

Hultman, Kathman & Shannon (2016). United Nations Peacekeeping Dynamics and the Duration of Post-Civil Conflict Peace. *Conflict Management and Peace Science*. 33(3): 231–49.

+ Critically analyze the conclusions

]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

## Prep for Class
1. ...

<br>

* Opening Discussion *

ANYTHING INTERESTING GOING ON IN WORLD POLITICS AT THE MOMENT?

<br>

EVERYBODY HAVE THE READINGS FOR TODAY?

<br>



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size45[.center[**Hultman, Kathman and Shannon (2016)**]]

<br>

## Diagram the Model

.size40[
+ Who are the key **Interests**?

+ What are the key **Institutions**?

+ What are the key **Interactions**?
]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/06_3-diplomacy1.png')
background-size: 50%
background-position: right

.pull-left[

<br>

<br>

<br>

.size50[
.center[
**Is this paper a "good" test of the bargaining model of war?**
]]]



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size50[.center[**How confident should we be in the conclusions of the paper?**]]

.size40[
1. Identify the key conclusions, and

2. Evaluate each based on its:
  + Data Sources
  + Case Selection
  + Operationalizations and Measurement
  + Analyses
]



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size50[.center[**Conclusion: The UN succeeds when...**]]

.size40[
1. Successful UN peacekeeping missions address "the security challenges to former belligerents" by providing "a greater number of troops" on the ground (246).

2. "...increasing the deployment of observer and police personnel is not likely to yield positive outcomes" (246).
]



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size50[.center[**High, Low or No Confidence?**]]

.size40[
1. Successful UN peacekeeping missions address "the security challenges to former belligerents" by providing "a greater number of troops" on the ground (246).

2. "...increasing the deployment of observer and police personnel is not likely to yield positive outcomes" (246).
]

--

.center[.size50[.textred[**Data Sources and Case Selection?**]]]



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size50[.center[**High, Low or No Confidence?**]]

.size40[
1. Successful UN peacekeeping missions address "the security challenges to former belligerents" by providing "a greater number of troops" on the ground (246).

2. "...increasing the deployment of observer and police personnel is not likely to yield positive outcomes" (246).
]

.center[.size50[.textred[**Concepts and Measurement?**]]]



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size50[.center[**High, Low or No Confidence?**]]

.size40[
1. Successful .textblue[**UN peacekeeping missions**] address "the security challenges to former belligerents" by providing "a greater number of .textblue[**troops**]" on the ground (246).

2. "...increasing the deployment of .textblue[**observer and police personnel**] is not likely to yield .textblue[**positive outcomes**]" (246).
]

.center[.size50[.textred[**Concepts and Measurement?**]]]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/07_3-Table1.png')
background-size: 92%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/07_3-table2.png')
background-size: 40%
background-position: right

.pull-left[

<br>

<br>

<br>

.center[.size50[**Analyses**]]

<br>

<br>

<br>

.center[.size50[**High, Low or No Confidence?**]]

]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/07_3-table2-1.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

???

Analyses: High, Low or No Confidence?



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/07_3-table2-2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/07_3-Figure2.png')
background-size: 82%
background-position: center



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size50[.center[**High, Low or No Confidence?**]]

.size40[
1. Successful UN peacekeeping missions address "the security challenges to former belligerents" by providing "a greater number of troops" on the ground (246).

2. "...increasing the deployment of observer and police personnel is not likely to yield positive outcomes" (246).
]
